title: stelis fasciculata
intro: Stelis fasciculata, also known as the Yellow Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis fasciculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its herbal preparations are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
